import 'package:cloud_firestore/cloud_firestore.dart' show Timestamp;
import 'package:suefery/data/enums/order_status.dart';
import 'package:suefery/data/models/models.dart';

  // Represents the full structured order generated by the S1 AI
class StructuredOrder{
  final DateTime createdAt;
  final String orderId;
  final String customerId;
  final String partnerId;
  final double estimatedTotal; // total order value
  final double deliveryFee; // total order value
  final String deliveryAddress; 
  final OrderStatus status; // New, Assigned, Delivered, Cancelled
  final double? progress; // 0.0 to 1.0 for tracking
  final String? riderId;
  final List<OrderItem> items;
  final bool isConfirmed;
  final DateTime finishedAt;
  final String? notes;
   
  StructuredOrder({
    required this.createdAt,
    required this.orderId,
    required this.customerId,
    required this.partnerId,
    required this.estimatedTotal,
    required this.deliveryFee,
    required this.deliveryAddress,
    required this.status,
    required this.progress,
    required this.riderId,
    required this.items,
    this.isConfirmed = false,
    required this.finishedAt,
    this.notes
  });
  //   @override
  // List<Object?> get props => [
  //   createdAt,
  //   orderId,
  //   customerId,
  //   partnerStoreName,
  //   estimatedTotal,
  //   deliveryFee,
  //   deliveryAddress,
  //   status,
  //   progress,
  //   riderId,
  //   items,
  //   isConfirmed,
  //   finishedAt,
  //   notes
  // ];
  
  //@override
  Map<String, dynamic> toMap()=> {
      'createdAt':Timestamp.fromDate(createdAt!),
      'orderId':orderId,
      'customerId': customerId,
      'partnerStoreName':partnerId,
      'estimatedTotal': estimatedTotal,
      'deliveryFee': deliveryFee,
      'deliveryAddress':deliveryAddress,
      'status':status.name,
      'progress':progress,
      'riderId':riderId,
      'items': items.map((item) => item.toMap()).toList(),
      'isConfirmed':isConfirmed,
      'finishedAt':finishedAt,
      'notes':notes
    };

  @override
  factory StructuredOrder.fromMap(Map<String, dynamic> data) => StructuredOrder(
      // Safely access Timestamp fields, providing a default DateTime if null
      createdAt: (data['createdAt'] as Timestamp?)?.toDate() ?? DateTime(1900),
      orderId: data['orderId'] as String? ?? '', // Provide default empty string
      customerId: data['customerId'] as String? ?? '',
      partnerId: data['partnerStoreName'] as String? ?? '',
      estimatedTotal: (data['estimatedTotal'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0.0, // Safely convert num to double
      deliveryFee: (data['deliveryFee'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0.0,
      deliveryAddress: data['deliveryAddress'] as String? ?? '',
      status: OrderStatus.values.firstWhere(
        (e) => e.name == (data['status'] as String?),
        orElse: () => OrderStatus.pending, // Default fallback
      ),
      progress: (data['progress'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0.0,
      riderId: data['riderId'] as String? ?? '',
      items: (data['items'] as List<dynamic>?)
              ?.map((item) => OrderItem.fromMap(item as Map<String, dynamic>))
              .toList() ?? [],
      isConfirmed: data['isConfirmed'] as bool? ?? false,
      finishedAt: (data['finishedAt'] as Timestamp?)?.toDate() ?? DateTime(1900),
      notes: data['notes'] as String? ?? '',
      );


  double get subtotal => items.fold(0.0, (sum, item) => sum + item.totalPrice);
  double get estimatedDeliveryFee => 5.0; // Mock fee
  double get grandTotal => subtotal + estimatedDeliveryFee;
}
